## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows existing project conventions (naming, style, file layout)
- [ ] I have not added unrelated changes or refactored beyond the scope of the card
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or personal data are committed
- [ ] Changes are limited to a single feature/card scope
- [ ] Public API changes (if any) are reflected in tests and docs
